name: OpenWeatherMap
description: Gets current and future weather information

fields.label: Format
fields.description: The format in which format the data should be returned

fields.label: Location Selection
fields.description: How to define the location for which to return the weather

fields.label: City
fields.description: The name of the city to return the weather of

fields.label: City ID
fields.description: The ID of city to return the weather of. List can be downloaded here: http://bulk.openweathermap.org/sample/.

fields.label: Latitude
fields.description: The latitude of the location to return the weather of

fields.label: Longitude
fields.description: The longitude of the location to return the weather of

fields.label: Zip Code
fields.description: The ID of city to return the weather of. List can be downloaded here: http://bulk.openweathermap.org/sample/.

fields.label: Language
fields.description: The two letter language code to get your output in (eg. en, de, ...).
